channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: US pressure on Greenland is ‘totally unacceptable’, says Danish PM – Europe live
item.description: Mette Frederiksen tells Munich Security Conference that Denmark is willing to work with the US, but ‘there are, of course, things that you cannot comp...

item.title: Girl, 17, who died after three-car crash in Cwmbran was ‘funny, kind and caring’
item.description: Family pay tribute to Demi Edmunds, from Caldicot, saying she ‘loved her friends, and she was loved by all’ A 17-year-old girl who died in a collision...

item.title: Four new astronauts arrive via SpaceX rocket at International Space Station
item.description: ISS now fully crewed after a medical issue forced the evacuation of four astronauts in January The International Space Station (ISS) returned to full ...

item.title: Nobel laureate transferred to prison in northern Iran without warning
item.description: Concern grows over Narges Mohammadi’s health, family says, after reports of ‘life-threatening mistreatment’ Iranian authorities have without prior war...

item.title: Rental ebike programs booming in Australian cities as e-scooter ‘moral panic’ sees take-up stall
item.description: After a fast kick-off in Australia, e-scooter hire crackdowns fuelled by safety concerns have seen shared ebikes pull ahead Get our breaking news emai...

item.title: Rejuvenated Scotland sweep England aside in stunning Calcutta Cup win
item.description: Rampant Scotland bounce back from Six Nations defeat by Italy to blow England away in a bonus-point win in a pulsating Calcutta Cup at a riotous Murra...

item.title: GB women shock curling world champions Canada
item.description: Great Britain's women curlers kickstart their campaign with a superb first victory of the 2026 Winter Olympics while GB's men also won but three Briti...

item.title: Rubio says US and Europe 'belong together' despite tensions
item.description: The US secretary of state reassures European leaders that the Trump administration backs the transatlantic alliance.

item.title: Tonali inspires Newcastle to win over Villa in controversial tie
item.description: Sandro Tonali scores twice as Newcastle United overcome multiple controversial refereeing decisions to knock 10-man Aston Villa out of the FA Cup.

item.title: Rejuvenated Scotland sweep England aside in stunning Calcutta Cup win
item.description: Rampant Scotland bounce back from Six Nations defeat by Italy to blow England away in a bonus-point win in a pulsating Calcutta Cup at a riotous Murra...
